text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm visiting a shrine with Gold City, who has been
stuck in a slump as of late.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I never considered a shrine a place for relaxation,
but... I guess it's not so bad.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It's quiet, and there's not many people around.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Interesting how different it is from when I'm here
on the job.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Not exactly. Before shooting a major collection or
filming a new TV show, we attend a prayer
ceremony.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
A bunch of us all get in a line, then the priest
waves that white thing around.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Not that that doesn't have its own vibe to it, but
you know, it's work, so everyone's just on edge.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I guess whether you're amped up or in the
trenches, once you've done all you can do, there's
nothing left but to pray to the gods.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well, let's get to it, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clang, clang!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(Um... Hey there, gods. If you're listening, I've just
been in sort of a rut lately, and I want to do
something about it.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(I'm not asking you to make me faster. Just,
whether I win or lose, I want it to be based on my
skill.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Well, that's done. I guess it might bring me peace of mind...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Actually, I think I'm already starting to feel
better!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I was feeling panicked, thinking I didn't
have enough time?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's go, Trainer. I feel like this will help me
concentrate on my practice tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She swiftly struts off into the distance. With the
sun shining behind her back, it looks as though
she's walking down a runway.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh, a message from my manager.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What, an urgent job? She's coming to pick me up
now?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Are you kidding me? I thought I finally had a
chance to rest...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Just gonna do me dirty like that, huh? Thanks,
gods. Thanks a lot...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her wishes going unanswered, Gold City's
mood doesn't seem to improve.
